name: Mixed Seafood Grill in Corn Husks
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Remove the skin from the salmon and cut into 1-inch cubes.
3. Combine the shrimp, salmon, and scallops in a medium bowl.
4. Toss with lemon pepper seasoning, white wine, and oleo.
5. Set aside.
6. Soak the corn husks in water to cover for 10 minutes.
7. Pull back the husks, leaving them attached at the stem.
8. Remove the silk and discard the corn; reserve the husks for use.
9. Divide the reserved seafood equally among the corn husks.
10. Top each with a sprig of dill.
11. Close the husks to completely enclose the seafood.
12. Tie securely with heavy string at each end.
13. Position the food rack 6 inches above the charcoal coals.
14. Place the husks on the food rack and grill uncovered for 10 minutes, turning frequently.
15. Serve immediately in the husks.
